title: Villager Recruits
description: Recruit and command villagers, manage armies through custom GUIs, enjoy PvP with diplomacy and team compatibility, and fully configurable features.
body:
![RecruitsBannerGIF](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3ac82e40-c1be-48fc-a80a-2ae088afa8c1)

### **Villager Recruits: Claim and Siege Update!**

Villager Recruits is an exciting Minecraft modification that allows you to hire and command your own army of villagers. Enhance your gameplay with strategic faction battles,
claim and siege mechanics and intelligent NPC features.

### Key Features:

- **Hire Villagers**: Use emeralds to recruit villagers for your personal army.
- **Command and Manage**: Utilize screens to effectively command and manage your recruits.
- **PvP and Faction Gameplay**: Engage in player vs. player or faction vs. faction battles.
- **Claim and Siege**: Launch an attack to conquer enemy territory or support allies with defending.
- **Vanilla Teams Support**: Integrates with Minecraft Vanilla Teams, featuring a custom GUI.
- **Smart Eating/Healing**: Villagers use food and potions intelligently.
- **Smart Shield Blocking**: Villagers block attacks efficiently using shields.
- **Group Commands**: Command large armies by organizing your recruits into groups.
- **Group management**: Recruit villagers from villages or noble villagers and manage your custom groups.
- **Mod Compatibility**: Works seamlessly with Small ships-Mod, Epic-Knights-Mod, and Corpse-Mod.
- **Highly Configurable**: Customize almost every aspect to fit your gameplay style.

---
